rules: Legacy @2/@2-front seeds use image_url only (white turntable at t=0)

reference_images_api.editor_compositing: Grok Imagine web @2+ compositing binds reference sheets via reference_images; not via prose @UUID tokens alone.
reference_images_api.finding: SDK exposes reference_image_file_ids on client.video.generate() but grok-imagine-video-1.5 returns 'reference_images is not supported for this model'. Barebones identity lock requires API parity or Editor manual path.

wiring_verdict: PR1 binding correct — image_file_id + reference_image_file_ids sent; API model lacks reference_images support
